title: 評判を聞いて集まってきたウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word spreads of our team and Umamusume start
showing interest in us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, they don't wish to join right away,
but maybe they'll change their minds depending
on our future performance.
